SETT CONF HELD: ARNOLD W. EVJE, II, JPT; ATTY EDWARD M. LIU FOR PLTF; DEFT JUAN MITCHELL, IN PRO PER. DEFT JONES NOT PRESENT; DAN MACDUFF, CLERK; BELDON YEE, CSR. CASE SETTLED. PLTF TO HAVE REST OF PREM FW, STAYED TO END OF DAY ON 6/30/ 01. DFTS MAY INSPECT ON 5/12/01 AND 6/16/01, AT NOON, FOR ONE HR; DEFT TO PROVIDE FULL SET OF KEYS TO PLTF'S AT 5/12 INSP. DFT MITCHELL TO GIVE PLTF'S CSL A CASHIER'S CHECK FOR $1,OOO.OO BY 5PM ON 5/8/01. WHEN DFT HAS VACATED, HE TO CALL PLTF'S ATTY. IF DFT DEFAULTS ON THIS AGREEMENT, PLTF'S MAY APPLY FOR JUDGMENT EX-PARTE. DFT DECLINES TO WAIVE RIGHTS OF APPEAL. PLTF'S CSL TO PREPARE A JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MITCHELL, JUAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1414 PALOU AVE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA., STAYED UNTIL JUN-30-2001, LEASE FORFEITED
